purpose: Probe the downloaded MCST annual regional-festival ZIP contents and first worksheet rows before full normalization.
method: Downloaded ZIPs to a temporary directory, extracted the first XLSX entry per year to a temporary directory, parsed xl/sharedStrings.xml and xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml for the first visible rows.
raw_binary_policy: Raw ZIP/XLSX binaries were not committed. This file records derived metadata and first-row summaries only.

notes: 2020 is a status snapshot during COVID disruption, not a normal annual plan.
Summary row order in workbook lists provinces first and total last.

cross_year_notes: The annual files use the same broad inclusion rule: multi-day culture/tourism/art/local festivals involving unspecified public participation.
The workbooks also include exclusion criteria such as contest-only events, simple resident consolation events, pure art performances and weakly festival-like expos or conferences.
Full normalization must skip title, summary, note and aggregate rows before extracting event-level festival records.
